skills.name: Ice Bolt
skills.description: Casts an Ice Arrow which inflicts damage to the target and nearby enemies, and freeze them by chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Number of targets: CaptionRatio2
Casting time: 0.5 seconds
[Freeze] Chance: CaptionRatio %
[Freeze] Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Ice Pike
skills.description: Create ice spikes from the ground in a line to inflict damage and freeze enemies by chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor %
Targets: CaptionRatio
[Freeze] Chance: CaptionRatio2 %
[Freeze] Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Ice Wall
skills.description: Creates a wall of ice that confines an enemy and freezes nearby enemies by chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor %
Ice Wall CaptionRatio
[Freeze] Chance CaptionRatio3 %
[Freeze] Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds
Duration of Ice Wall: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Ice Blast
skills.description: Deals damage to frozen or chilled enemies, and enemies near the Ice Wall.
skills.effect_text:
[Freeze] Skill factor to the target SkillFactor % x 2
Targets: 8

skills.name: Subzero Shield
skills.description: Create a curtain of ice for the defense to block enemy attacks by the chance of #{CaptionRatio2}#%. Decreases the damage when succeeding in Defense, and freezes the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Decreases damage by CaptionRatio3 %
[Freeze] Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Defense range: 50

skills.name: Snow Rolling
skills.description: Ride an enormous snowball and crush any enemies in your way. When using Snow Rolling, quick slot changes, and can be canceled when using skills.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Target: CaptionRatio
Casting Time: 1 second(s)
Duration: CaptionRatio2 second(s)

skills.name: Frost Pillar
skills.description: Summons a tree of ice on the ground that freezes and damages enemies nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Casting Time: 2 second(s)
Ice Tree Duration: CaptionTime second(s)
Target: CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Ice Bolt: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ice Bolt] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ice Pike: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ice Pike] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ice Blast: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ice Blast] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Snow Rolling: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Snow Rolling] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ice Bolt: Chance of Freeze
attributes.description:
* [Ice Bolt] has 10% chance per attribute level to freeze the enemy

* Cannot be applied in PVP area

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Subzero Shield: Duration
attributes.description:
* Increases freeze duration of [Subzero Shield] by 0.5 seconds per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Cryomancer: Freeze Speciality
attributes.description: * Chance to [Freeze] enemies of Cryomancer skills increases by 5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Subzero Shield: Counterattack
attributes.description:
* While equipped with a Shield when [Subzero Shield] is active, there is an increase in counterattack damage based on your Shield's defense

* Counterattack damage is enhanced by 50% per attribute level

* Subzero Shield buff removes when removing the shield

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Shield Mastery: Cryomancer
attributes.description: * Increases Magic Defense by 5% per attribute level proportionally to the Shield Magic Defense when [Shield] is equipped

attributes.name: Ice Wall: Duration
attributes.description: * Increases duration of [Ice Wall] by 10 seconds

attributes.name: Frost Pillar: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Frost Pillar] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ice Blast: Break
attributes.description:
* [Ice Blast] changes to casting skill and applies 4 consecutive hits.

* Removes frozen or chilled enemies with [Ice Blast], gives damage that ignores their defense by 20%(ignores 10% when PVP)

* Casting time: 2 seconds

* Changes Overheat to 1time

attributes.name: Snow Rolling: Tumble
attributes.description: * At the end of [Snow Rolling], any enemies caught are knocked down on the spot.

attributes.name: [Arts] Ice Wall: Magic Igloo
attributes.description:
* Magic Igloo is created when casting [Ice Wall]

* Decreases ally's Magic damage by 30% and immune to [Freeze] status ailment

* Recovers HP according to your HP Recovery every 1 second

attributes.name: [Arts] Ice Bolt: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ice Bolt] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Ice Pike: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ice Pike] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Ice Blast: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ice Blast] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Snow Rolling: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Snow Rolling] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Frost Pillar: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Frost Pillar] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cryomancer: Thin Ice
attributes.description:
* Removes [Freeze] effect of Cryomancer's skill except for Frost Pillar

* Instead of applying [Freeze], applies [Chill] debuff to an enemy for the duration of [Freeze]

* Increases Final Damage by 100% when attacking an enemy under [Chill] with Cryomancer's skill.
